title: epilobium fastigiatum subsp. glaberrimum
intro: Epilobium fastigiatum subsp. glaberrimum, also known as Willowherb, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the willowherb family Onagraceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support kidney function. Epilobium fastigiatum subsp. glaberrimum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for medicinal use.
